# Docs Sentinel policy — paris

## The rule you are enforcing

> Documentation must stay current with every change: whenever a change alters a command, port,
> env var, schema, API route, or convention that an in-scope doc describes, the affected doc must
> be updated in the same change.

## Documentation in scope (the ONLY files you may edit)

- **`README.md`** (root) — consumer-facing install and setup: package install, tsconfig
  `moduleResolution` requirement, `paris/theme` / `paris/theme/global.css` import paths,
  `generateCSS` / `generateThemeInjection` usage, `paris-container` class, container-query
  polyfill guidance, upgrade pointers.
- **`AGENTS.md`** — agent guide: repository structure, the component inventory with one-line API
  descriptions (generic option typing, focus/error-state contracts), development workflows.
- **`CLAUDE.md`** — agent guide: the `bun run` command table, build pipeline
  (`generate:exports` → `vite build` → `scripts/postbuild.mjs`), architecture patterns
  (Enhancer, Overrides, Field wrapper, generic options, compound components), z-index layer
  token table, styling rules, UI-primitive dependency list, consumer integration steps.
- **`TESTING.md`** — test commands (`test`, `test:watch`, `test:storybook`, `test:all`,
  `test:coverage`, `test:coverage-check`), the two-layer unit/story test architecture, test file
  layout conventions.
- **`public/llms.txt`** — consumer-facing quick facts, setup snippet, and per-component usage
  patterns served from the docs site.
- **`.claude/skills/*.md` and `.claude/skills/**/SKILL.md`** — agent skills that state facts
  about this repo: script paths (e.g. the test-coverage checker), the Storybook port (6006),
  story-ID conventions, verification steps.

## Out of scope — never touch

- `CHANGELOG.md` — generated by changesets.
- `.changeset/**` — release tooling config and pending changeset entries.
- `docs/superpowers/**` — dated plans, specs, and notes; point-in-time records that must not be
  rewritten after the fact.
- `public/migrate-0.24.md` — frozen, version-pinned migration guide.
- `src/stories/**/*.mdx` — Storybook docs pages, maintained by humans alongside component code.
- `LICENSE`.

## Triggers worth checking specifically

Cross-reference the diff against the docs when it touches any of:

- `package.json` — `scripts` (command tables in CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/TESTING.md), `exports`
  (import paths in README/llms.txt), `dependencies`/`peerDependencies` (UI-primitive list,
  React/Next version claims).
- `src/stories/<component>/` — adding/removing a component or changing a public prop/API
  (component inventory in AGENTS.md, usage snippets in `public/llms.txt`).
- `src/stories/theme/` (`tokens.ts`, `themes.ts`) — theme/token claims, the z-index layer table
  in CLAUDE.md.
- `scripts/` (`postbuild.mjs`, `generateExports.cjs`, `createComponent.cjs`,
  `checkTestCoverage.cjs`) — build-pipeline description in CLAUDE.md, script paths referenced by
  `.claude/skills/update-tests.md`.
- `vite.config.ts`, `vitest.config.ts`, `tsconfig*.json` — build/test architecture claims in
  CLAUDE.md and TESTING.md.
- `.storybook/**` or the Storybook port — TESTING.md and `.claude/skills/verify/SKILL.md`.
- `biome.json`, `lefthook.yml`, `commitlint.config.mjs` — tooling claims in CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md.

## How to verify facts

Read the source directly with Read/Grep/Glob — `package.json` for scripts and exports,
`scripts/*.{mjs,cjs}` for the build pipeline, component `.tsx` files under `src/stories/` for
props and public APIs, `src/stories/theme/themes.ts` for tokens and layer values, and
`vitest.config.ts` for the test projects. Never run build, install, or dev commands.
